[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10011000 3
1 10100011 4
2 10000101 3
3 10010001 3
4 00011001 3
5 00000110 2
6 00011100 3
7 10100010 3
